final:
module sram_16bit (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] addr,
    input [15:0] data_in,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] obf_memory [0:15]; // 16 obf_memory cells of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            obf_memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory
        end else begin
            data_out <= obf_memory[addr]; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
